name: Cherry Cheese Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Frozen Bread Dough,  see note
recipeInstructions:
1. On a lightly floured surface, roll dough to a 13 x 9 inches rectangle.
2. Place the rolled dough in a prepared 13 x 9 inches pan.
3. Cover and let rise double in size, about 1 hour.
4. In a mixing bowl, combine cherry pie filling and raisins. Spread evenly over the dough.
5. In another mixing bowl, combine cream cheese, granulated sugar, milk, 2 tablespoons flour, and almond extract.
6. Pour the mixture over the cherry mixture.
7. In a small mixing bowl, combine remaining flour, brown sugar, and margarine until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
8. Sprinkle the crumb mixture evenly over the cream cheese layer.
9. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 40 minutes.
Per serving: 185 Calories; 2g Fat (9% calories from fat); 6g Protein; 38g Carbohydrate; 11mg Cholesterol; 199mg Sodium
Serving Ideas: Cool and cut into squares.
Notes: Thaw frozen bread dough in the refrigerator overnight.
